worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Parker Harris publicly questioning why customers should ever log into Salesforce again is a rare on-record signal of SaaS self-disruption — directly relevant to sales enablement and CRM strategy.

worthClicking.author: @levie
worthClicking.why: Aaron Levie names two underappreciated causes of AI-driven overwork: leverage amplification and the new expectation ratchet — useful framing for product and org strategy.

worthClicking.author: @signulll
worthClicking.why: Concrete 3-layer ambient intent capture model for future interfaces is one of the more grounded HCI architecture posts in recent weeks.

worthClicking.author: @minchoi
worthClicking.why: Anthropic confirmed a Claude Code billing bug that silently routed a user off the flat-rate plan to API billing, then refused a refund — a real trust and pricing risk for indie builders relying on Max plan.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Frames Anthropic's $20 Claude Pro as a deflationary bundle eating Adobe/Figma/Notion revenue — a tight competitive positioning read worth keeping in mind for AI product strategy.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Does the actual unit economics math on Claude Managed Agents ($0.08/session-hour), making the cost case concrete rather than abstract.

worthClicking.author: @kimmonismus
worthClicking.why: 400k white-collar job decline — first annual drop since 2026 — is the clearest labor displacement data point in this feed cycle.

worthClicking.author: @DataChaz
worthClicking.why: Head of a well-curated Claude Code resource bible thread with 52+ tools across MCP servers, agent frameworks, multiplexers, and extensions — saves hours of discovery.

voices.why: Consistently doing actual unit-economics math on AI product moves (Managed Agents pricing, Claude Pro bundle, PM mockup cost collapse) rather than vibes — high relevance to AI product strategy.
Box CEO offering practitioner-level takes on agentic leverage and org change, not just hype.
Thinking seriously about HCI and the intent-capture layer — relevant to anyone building the next interface layer on top of models.
Surfaces real-world Claude Code workflow and billing edge cases that matter to builders before they spread widely.

examples: @aakashgupta newsletter self-promotion spam (6+ identical 'subscribe to my newsletter' posts)
RoundtableSpace crypto/Bitcoin shilling and engagement-bait polls
aakashgupta off-topic reposts (marathon results, gum disease, Dean Cain)
